content:
🚀 docker-android | Shell
🎯 Primary Use Case: Running Android emulators in a Docker container for automated testing and CI/CD pipelines.
✨ Key Features: • Minimal Alpine based image with Android emulator and KVM support • Bundles Java Runtime Environment 11 • Customizable Android version, device type, and image types • Port-forwarding of emulator and ADB • Emulator images are wiped on restart
📖 Summary: This repository provides a minimal and customizable Docker image for running the Android emulator as a service. It's designed for headless execution, making it ideal for CI/CD pipelines and automated testing environments.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
